## Common Tasks

### Add a Feature
1. Create implementation in `{{SOURCE_DIR}}`
2. Add tests in `{{TEST_DIRECTORY}}`
3. Run `{{TEST_COMMAND}}`
4. Run `{{LINT_COMMAND}}`

### Fix a Bug
1. Reproduce with a failing test
2. Fix the code
3. Verify all tests pass

### Refactor
1. Verify test coverage exists
2. Refactor incrementally
3. Run tests after each change
